Halloween Email Promotion #2	                       		                Copyright Free Template



SUBJECT:  No tricks, just treats



Dear (insert first name), 



This week we’re celebrating Halloween and whether

 you participate in this good old fashioned ghostly 

fun or not...



I’ve got a special TREAT for you:



[insert deal]



I know this deal will frighten the “you know what” 

out of you and may even send you to an early 

grave! 



[insert some of the transformation and benefits

the prospect will get when they do business with 

you]



But hurry, this SPOOKY discount offer won’t last...



...and that’s no TRICK. 



So treat yourself right now to [insert deal along with 

benefit for doing business with you]



[insert call to action…call, go to website, or come 

into the store] 



Happy Halloween!



[Insert name and company]



P.S. Am I batty? I don’t think so. Because adults

 deserve treats on Halloween too and with so much on 

your plate, isn’t it time you [insert pain or problem 

you or your business solves]



Don’t miss out on this MONSTER offer because it 

expires immediately at the witching hour of midnight.  



[insert link to squeeze page]
